header.seasonRecapBody: Review per-patch top RP comps and the full season meta flow in one place.
header.localeRecommendationBody: Your browser language is set to {language}. Switch to that language?

patches.indexSubtitle: Browse character changes patch by patch in Eternal Return.
patches.indexDescription: Eternal Return patch 10.1–10.7 character buff/nerf changes. See all adjusted characters at a glance.
patches.archiveCaption: Every character buff, nerf, and rework entry currently indexed in ER&GG.
patches.detailDescription: Character adjustments in patch {patch}: {buffs} buffs, {nerfs} nerfs across {count} characters.

rootMetadata.description: ER&GG provides Eternal Return character tiers, trio recommendations, and win rate, pick rate, and average RP statistics based on high-rank match data.
rootMetadata.author: ER&GG
rootMetadata.creator: ER&GG
rootMetadata.structuredDescription: Eternal Return character tiers, trio recommendations, and statistics analysis service

sectionErrorBoundary.temporaryIssue: This may be a temporary issue.

home.title: Meta Analysis

home.honeyPicksDescription: Characters climbing after buffs with rising pick and win rates
home.topFiveCaption: Top characters by win rate, pick rate, and RP movement
home.rankingDescription: Overall rankings based on meta score

rising.title: Fastest riser
rising.body: {name} is up {winRateDelta}pp in win rate with an RP swing of {averageRPDelta}.

concentration.title: Meta concentration
concentration.body: The top {count} characters account for {share}% of total pick share.

patchResponse.title: Buff response
patchResponse.body: {buffedCount} of the top {count} risers were buffed or adjusted this patch.

home.deepDiveBody: Open the Data Lab to inspect broader stats and meta trends.

tooltips.pickRate: Share of games where this character was picked.
tooltips.winRate: Rate of finishing 1st with this character. Expected baseline: 12.5%.
tooltips.averageRp: Average rank points gained per game. Positive values mean climbing.

honeyPicks.empty: No buffed breakout characters were found for this patch.

characterMetadata.socialDescription: Eternal Return character win rate, pick rate, average RP, and optimal build statistics.
